name: Hua Xiong
page_title: Hua Xiong 華雄 [Dong Zhuo] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Historically, did not slay Yu She, Fang Yue or Pan Feng, none of whom appear in the histories.
	Historically, was not sent to face the Coalition with an independant command. Instead, he was a minor officer under Hu Zhen and Lü Bu.
	Did not kill or even pursue Zu Mao. Xu Rong pursued.
	Was not killed by Guan Yu. Was killed in battle with Sun Jian by his troops.

full_text:
Hua Xiong 華雄
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua Xiong (華雄). Brave general in service to Dong Zhuo. Died in battle with Sun Jian. Hua Xiong was affiliated with Dong Zhuo. Hua Xiong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Historically, did not slay Yu She, Fang Yue or Pan Feng, none of whom appear in the histories.
Historically, was not sent to face the Coalition with an independant command. Instead, he was a minor officer under Hu Zhen and Lü Bu.
Did not kill or even pursue Zu Mao. Xu Rong pursued.

Hua Xiong
Date:04/2004Replies:33
BiographyCollaborative Works
Hua Xiong was an officer of Dong Zhuo. He had the title of Commander. When Dong Zhuo was fighting back against the coalition, Hua Xiong was part of a large army that moved to Yangren, but its disorganization led to an easy victory for the opposing general Sun Jian, and Hua Xiong was slain in battle.
